---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new pattern, CLI option, or library capability
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Frame it as a pain point, not a
solution. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How should this work? Describe the user-facing change in enough
detail that a maintainer can implement it without a long
back-and-forth. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you look at? Why is this approach better? -->

## Use case

<!-- Concrete scenario showing how you'd use the feature once it
lands. -->

## Willingness to contribute

<!-- Pick one. If you can land it yourself, the turnaround is
usually much shorter. -->

- [ ] I am willing to open a PR with this change.
- [ ] I can help test, but not implement.
- [ ] I just want the feature; I can't help land it.

## Additional context

<!-- Links to prior discussion, similar projects, design docs. -->
